input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.5.3
            TITLE: driver clearance and egress test completion

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.5.3: Driver Clearance and Egress Test Completion
IN.5.3 Driver Clearance and Egress Test Completion

RULE: in.5.1
            TITLE: driver clearance

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.5.1: Driver Clearance
IN.5.1 Driver Clearance 
Each driver in the normal driving position is checked for the three: 
• Helmet clearance  F.5.6.3 
• Head Restraint positioning  T.2.8.5  
• Harness fit and adjustment  T.2.5, T.2.6, T.2.7

RULE: in.5
            TITLE: driver cockpit checks

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.5: DRIVER COCKPIT CHECKS
IN.5 DRIVER COCKPIT CHECKS  
The Clearance Checks and Egress Test may be performed separately or in conjunction with 
other parts of Technical Inspection

final_answer: DRIVER COCKPIT CHECKS IN.5 DRIVER COCKPIT CHECKS The Clearance Checks and Egress Test may be performed separately or in conjunction with other parts of Technical Inspection
